Caption: Name
Description: Given name in the user interface

Caption: Branch id
Description: (optional) Branch on which the structure is lcoated.

Caption: Number of coordinates
Description: (optional) Number of values in xCoordinates and yCoordinates. This value should be greater or equal 2.

Caption: Velocity height flag
Description: Flag indicates whether the velocity height is to be calculated or not.

Caption: Control side
Description: On which side(s) built-in pump triggering is active. Only required/used when numStages > 0. Possible values: suctionSide: Suction side control. deliverySide: Delivery side control. both: Suction and Delivery side control.

Caption: Number of trigger stages
Description: Number of trigger stages in pump. Set to 0 to disable built-in triggering.

Caption: Start level of suction side
Description: Start level suction side (m AD). (number of values = numStages)

Caption: Stop level of suction side
Description: Stop level suction side (m AD). (number of values = numStages)

Caption: Start level of delivery side
Description: Start level suction side (m AD). (number of values = numStages)

Caption: Stop level of delivery side
Description: Stop level suction side (m AD). (number of values = numStages)

Caption: Number of reduction levels
Description: Number of levels in reduction table.

Caption: Head
column10: the difference in waterlevel (delivery side - suction side) (m). (number of values = numReductionLevels)

Caption: Crest level
Description: Filename of a <*.pli> file containing x-/y-points of the gate's position. (2D only)

Caption: Horizontal opening direction:Symmetric|From Left|From Right
Description: Horizontal direction of the opening doors

Caption: Positive free gate flow corr. coeff.
Positive drowned gate flow corr. coeff.
Description: Positive drowned gate flow corr. coeff.

Caption: Postive free weir flow corr. coeff.
Description: Postive free weir flow corr. coeff.

Caption: Positive drowned weir flow corr. coeff.
Description: Positive drowned weir flow corr. coeff.

Caption: Negative free gate flow corr. coeff.
Description: Negative free gate flow corr. coeff.

Caption: Negative drowned gate flow corr. coeff.
Description: Negative drowned gate flow corr. coeff.

Caption: Negative free weir flow corr. coeff.
Description: Negative free weir flow corr. coeff.

Caption: Negative drowned weir flow corr. coeff.
Description: Negative drowned weir flow corr. coeff.

Caption: Algorithm:Verheij - vd Knaap (2002)|User defined breach
Description: 0 = unknown 2 = Verheij - vd Knaap (2002) 3 = User defined

Caption: Time to reach maximum breach depth
Description: Time to reach maximum breach depth (in seconds) [s]

Caption: Breach start time
Description: Start time of the breach (in seconds) [s]

Caption: Path to the user defined breach
Description: Path to the user defined breach

Caption: Y
Description: y-values of the cross section (m). (number of values = numLevels)

Caption: Z
Description: z-values of the cross section (m). (number of values = numLevels)
